Originally established as 'Zhenxin (Beijing) Semiconductor', the company executed a significant relocation to Yuhang District, Hangzhou, a major hub for IC design and digital economy in the Yangtze River Delta. Despite its 'micro' enterprise classification (0 insured employees), its substantial registered capital (~98.88M RMB) and paid-in capital (~57.58M RMB) point towards a fabless IC design house or a holding entity focused on memory chips and related intellectual property.
